channel.title: math.KT updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.KT updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: A cofibrant model of Waldhausen K-theory
item.description: arXiv:2607.10886v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This paper gives some technical results about cofibrant symmetric spectra of simplicial sets, and uses them to produce a model of the $K$-theory of a Waldhausen category that lands in the subcategory of (projective) cofibrant spectra.
item.dc:creator: Kate Ponto, Inna Zakharevich

item.title: Gromov's Simplicial Volume Vanishing Conjecture for Positive Scalar Curvature and Fundamental Group Decay
item.description: arXiv:2606.29135v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: A conjecture of Gromov predicts that every closed oriented manifold admitting a metric of positive scalar curvature has vanishing simplicial volume. In this paper, we prove this conjecture under a mild decay condition on the fundamental group. As a geometric application, we show that, in every dimension, there exists a universal negative constant such that any closed oriented manifold whose scalar curvature is bounded below by a normalized positive constant and whose Ricci curvature is bounded below by the universal constant has vanishing simplicial volume.
item.dc:creator: Qiaochu Ma, Guoliang Yu
